# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: compute-engine
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:instances
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - autoDelete: true
      boot: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/gce-uefi-images/global/images/ubuntu-1804-lts
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
  dependsOn:
  - storage-bucket
  - cloud-sql

- name: cloud-sql
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        requireSsl: false
        authorizedNetworks:
          - value: 0.0.0.0/0
            name: all-ips
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    region: us-central1
    rootPassword: <root_password>
    backupConfiguration:
      enabled: true
      startTime: 23:00
      location: us-central1

- name: storage-bucket
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
  properties:
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action: delete
          condition:
            ageInDays: 365

- name: load-balancer
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:targetPools
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    sessionAffinity: NONE
    backends:
    - group: compute-engine
      balancingMode: RATE
      maxRatePerInstance: 10
      maxRatePerEndpoint: 20
      capacityScaler: 1.5
